user.title: Evolute Setup
user.description:
Enter your evassist.ru credentials.

Get tokens from browser DevTools → Application → Cookies on app.evassist.ru: copy `evy-platform-access` and `evy-platform-refresh` values.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired tokens. Get fresh ones from the browser.

data.access_token: Access Token (leave unchanged if still valid)
data.refresh_token: Refresh Token (leave unchanged if still valid)
